manifesto: Your exam preparation is NOT wasted time. Every subject you have studied, every mock test you have given, every concept you have mastered — these are real, transferable, marketable professional skills. Plan B is not a consolation prize. It is a parallel career that runs alongside your main goal, pays you while you prepare, and becomes your safety net that is stronger than what most people call their main plan.

hidden_skills.how: You have been analysing government policies, historical events, and international affairs. This is exactly what think-tanks, policy organisations, and content companies need.
UPSC Mains answer writing requires 150-250 word precise, structured answers. You can write better than 95% of working professionals.
You follow national and international news more deeply than any journalist trainee. This is directly marketable to news outlets, content companies, and research firms.
Ethics paper trains you to analyse moral dilemmas. Legal, compliance, and policy roles need exactly this.
Extremely rare in corporate India. Especially valuable in media, government liaison, and Hindi content companies.
Solving DI problems daily builds analytical thinking that finance, consulting, and research roles value.

plan_b_jobs.title: Content Writer / Research Writer
plan_b_jobs.how_skills_match: Your UPSC current affairs reading + essay writing = professional content. You already write better than most entry-level content writers.
plan_b_jobs.salary_range: ₹2-6 LPA starting. ₹8-15 LPA with 3 years experience.
plan_b_jobs.time_to_first_job: 1-3 months with portfolio of 5 sample articles
where_to_find: Direct outreach to digital news portals (The Lallantop, The Wire, NewsLaundry)
plan_b_jobs.how_to_start: Write 5 articles on topics you know deeply from UPSC prep. Publish them on Medium or LinkedIn. Share them. That is your portfolio.
plan_b_jobs.plan_b_complements_main: Content writing jobs are usually 9-5 or flexible hours. Many UPSC aspirants work as content writers and prepare simultaneously. The reading you do for UPSC becomes content research automatically.

plan_b_jobs.title: Policy Research Assistant / Analyst
plan_b_jobs.how_skills_match: Think-tanks, NGOs, government consultancies, and law firms all need people who understand policy, can research, and can write structured briefs. UPSC prep is better training than any MBA for this.
plan_b_jobs.salary_range: ₹3-8 LPA at NGOs/think-tanks. ₹8-15 LPA at consulting firms.
where_to_find: Direct application to PRS Legislative Research, CSDS Delhi, CPR India
plan_b_jobs.how_to_start: Use your UPSC optional subject notes to write a 2-3 page policy brief on one topic. That is your work sample.
plan_b_jobs.plan_b_complements_main: Policy research work deepens your UPSC knowledge. Many research assistants at Delhi think-tanks have cracked UPSC while working there.

plan_b_jobs.title: SSC/Banking Exam Tutor (Online/Offline)
plan_b_jobs.qualification: You — the UPSC aspirant — already know GS better than most SSC teachers
plan_b_jobs.how_skills_match: Your GS, Polity, History, Geography, and Current Affairs knowledge is exactly what SSC CGL, IBPS, and state PSC candidates need taught to them.
plan_b_jobs.time_to_first_job: 2-4 weeks — start with 2-3 students and word of mouth
where_to_find: Local WhatsApp groups in your city
Unacademy Educator programme (earn from teaching online)
Start a YouTube channel on one GS topic
plan_b_jobs.how_to_start: Teach 2 free sessions in your mohalla/neighbourhood. Ask for ₹300/session after that. Within a month you will have 5-10 regular students.
plan_b_jobs.plan_b_complements_main: Teaching reinforces your own learning. Many UPSC toppers say they cracked UPSC the year they started teaching — because explaining concepts to others forces deeper understanding.

plan_b_jobs.title: Compliance / Legal Assistant at Company
plan_b_jobs.how_skills_match: Companies need people who understand government regulations, compliance requirements, and policy changes. Your UPSC Polity and governance knowledge is directly applicable.
where_to_find: SECL, NTPC, SAIL CG have large compliance departments
plan_b_jobs.how_to_start: Get a basic certificate in Labour Law or GST from Coursera/NIIT (₹2,000-5,000). Add to resume. Apply to local companies.
plan_b_jobs.plan_b_complements_main: Compliance roles are often 9-6 with weekends free — allowing 3-4 hours of UPSC prep daily.

hidden_skills.how: You solve 20 DI questions in 12 minutes. This is real-world financial data analysis speed.
Puzzle-solving and seating arrangement trains systematic thinking used in operations, supply chain, and project management.
Reading graphs, tables, pie charts — this is the core skill of data analysts and financial analysts.
You know RBI policies, monetary policy, economic schemes better than most MBA students.
Daily RC practice makes you a faster, better reader and writer than most office workers.

plan_b_jobs.title: MIS Executive / Data Entry & Reporting
plan_b_jobs.how_skills_match: Your QA and DI skills translate directly to Excel/data work. MIS (Management Information Systems) executives create dashboards and reports — exactly what DI practice prepares you for.
plan_b_jobs.how_to_start: Learn Excel in 2 weeks free on YouTube (Leila Gharani channel). Get free Excel certification from Microsoft Learn. Apply immediately.
plan_b_jobs.plan_b_complements_main: MIS roles are often 9-6 with low cognitive load. You can prepare for banking exams in evenings. Many banking aspirants work as MIS executives simultaneously.

plan_b_jobs.title: Accounts Executive / Junior Accountant
plan_b_jobs.qualification: Commerce graduation or basic Tally knowledge
plan_b_jobs.how_skills_match: SSC/Banking QA preparation covers arithmetic and numbers intensively. Basic Tally learning (3 weeks free on YouTube) makes you hireable as accounts executive at any local business.
plan_b_jobs.salary_range: ₹1.8–3.5 LPA starting (small towns). ₹3.5–6 LPA after 2–3 years.
where_to_find: WorkIndia app (very active for local accounts jobs)
plan_b_jobs.how_to_start: Download Tally Prime trial version (free) and watch 10 YouTube tutorials. Get Tally certificate from Tally Academy (₹3,000-5,000). Immediately hireable.
plan_b_jobs.plan_b_complements_main: Accounts work is generally 10-6 with predictable hours. Evenings free for exam prep.

plan_b_jobs.title: Customer Service / Relationship Executive (Banks/NBFCs)
plan_b_jobs.how_skills_match: Banking awareness, basic financial product knowledge, and English comprehension you built for the exam — directly applicable to customer-facing bank and NBFC roles.
where_to_find: Direct walk-in at local bank branches (ask for relationship executive openings)
HDFC, ICICI, Axis Bank career pages
plan_b_jobs.how_to_start: Walk into 3 bank branches near you. Ask if they have openings for relationship executives or trainee associates. Many banks hire on the spot for this role.
plan_b_jobs.plan_b_complements_main: Working at a private bank teaches you how banking actually works — making your banking awareness answers in the exam far more accurate and real. The practical experience helps you in the IBPS interview.

hidden_skills.how: Deep understanding of human body, diseases, nutrition, and medicine. Healthcare companies, diagnostics, pharma need this.
Understanding of PCR, ELISA, Cell Culture from syllabus — valuable for biotech and pharma companies.
NEET Physics and Chemistry problem-solving is systematic analytical thinking.
Ecology chapter gives deep environmental science knowledge useful in environmental compliance, CSR, and NGO work.

plan_b_jobs.title: Medical Representative (Pharma MR)
plan_b_jobs.qualification: Any science graduation (BSc, B.Pharm, or even NEET drop year students)
plan_b_jobs.how_skills_match: Your Biology and Chemistry knowledge from NEET is exactly what pharma companies train Medical Representatives on. You already know more than most MR trainees.
plan_b_jobs.salary_range: ₹2-4 LPA starting + incentives. ₹5-10 LPA with performance.
where_to_find: Pharma company careers pages (Cipla, Sun Pharma, Dr Reddy's, Abbott India)
Walk into local pharma distributor offices in Bilaspur/Raipur
plan_b_jobs.how_to_start: Apply directly to 5 pharma company career pages. Most do walk-in interviews. No experience required for entry MR role.
plan_b_jobs.plan_b_complements_main: MR work builds your practical understanding of medicines and clinical practice. Many MRs have used this experience + NEET preparation to eventually crack NEET or get into pharmacy.

plan_b_jobs.title: Lab Technician / Diagnostic Assistant
plan_b_jobs.qualification: BSc Biology / Diploma in Medical Lab Technology (DMLT) — 1 year course
plan_b_jobs.how_skills_match: Your Biology knowledge + a 1-year DMLT diploma (₹20,000-40,000) makes you a certified lab technician. Government hospitals recruit lab technicians through CGVYAPAM.
plan_b_jobs.salary_range: ₹1.5–3.5 LPA starting in private labs. Government hospital: ₹3–6 LPA with benefits.
where_to_find: CGVYAPAM notifications for Lab Technician posts
Private diagnostic labs in your city (Lal PathLabs, SRL Diagnostics, Thyrocare franchises)
Local hospitals and clinics direct approach
plan_b_jobs.how_to_start: Enrol in DMLT from any recognised paramedical college in Raipur or Bilaspur. 1 year. ₹20,000-40,000. Government hospital stable job at the end.
plan_b_jobs.plan_b_complements_main: Working in a lab while preparing for NEET gives you direct clinical exposure that strengthens your Biology applications knowledge. NEET score + working lab experience = stronger medical college applicant.

plan_b_jobs.title: Health & Wellness Content Writer / YouTuber
plan_b_jobs.how_skills_match: Your detailed Biology and health knowledge is exactly what health content websites, YouTube channels, and wellness apps need. You can explain medical concepts clearly — most writers cannot.
plan_b_jobs.salary_range: ₹1.5–4 LPA employed (junior health writer). Freelance or YouTube income varies widely with audience — treat as upside, not a guarantee.
plan_b_jobs.time_to_first_job: 1-3 months for employed role. YouTube takes 1-2 years to monetise.
where_to_find: Start a YouTube channel on Biology — hugely underserved in Hindi
plan_b_jobs.how_to_start: Write 5 explainer articles on diseases/body functions. Publish on LinkedIn. Share in relevant groups. Portfolio ready in 1 week.
plan_b_jobs.plan_b_complements_main: Teaching Biology on YouTube or writing health content deepens your own NEET preparation dramatically. Explanation forces mastery.

hidden_skills.how: Calculus, algebra, probability — you are operating at a level above most working analysts.
JEE trains you to break complex problems into steps under time pressure — a skill management consulting firms pay ₹15-25 LPA for.
Systems thinking from Physics — understanding cause-effect chains — is directly applicable to software debugging, data analysis, and engineering operations.

plan_b_jobs.title: Coding / Programming (Self-Taught Developer)
plan_b_jobs.how_skills_match: Your JEE-level Maths (especially algebra and logic) is the perfect foundation for programming. Most good coders started with strong Maths — which you have.
plan_b_jobs.salary_range: ₹3.5-8 LPA starting. ₹12-25 LPA after 3 years. Remote work possible.
where_to_find: HackerRank / LeetCode profiles to showcase skills
plan_b_jobs.how_to_start: Start Python today on freeCodeCamp.org (completely free). Then do 50 LeetCode problems. Then build 2 projects. This sequence takes 4-6 months. You will be hireable.
plan_b_jobs.plan_b_complements_main: Learning to code while preparing for JEE actually helps JEE — programming trains logical thinking. And if you get into a state engineering college, you will already be ahead of classmates.

plan_b_jobs.title: Mathematics Tutor (Class 9-12)
plan_b_jobs.qualification: JEE preparation-level Maths knowledge — you are among the top 5% in India for Class 12 Maths
plan_b_jobs.how_skills_match: You can teach Class 9-12 Maths better than 90% of school teachers. This is immediately monetisable.
where_to_find: Unacademy Educator programme (earn from teaching online)
plan_b_jobs.how_to_start: Offer to teach 2 students for free for one week. Ask for honest feedback. Then charge ₹500-1,000/month per student. 10 students = ₹5,000-10,000/month passive income.
plan_b_jobs.plan_b_complements_main: Teaching Maths makes your own JEE Maths stronger. Every concept you explain to a student gets locked in your memory permanently.

exam_skill_mappings.exam_label: Student with Low Marks (Below 50% in 10th or 12th)
exam_skill_mappings.manifesto_special: Low marks do not define you. They define only one thing: which exam routes are currently available to you. There are genuine, respected, well-paying careers that require absolutely no competitive exam, no high marks, and no coaching fees. The students who succeed in these paths are not 'consolation cases' — they are people who found a route that matched their real strengths.

metro_corporate_paths.section_title: Metro corporate — entry roles (Bengaluru, Pune, Chennai, Delhi NCR)
metro_corporate_paths.metros_list: Bengaluru, Pune, Chennai, and Delhi NCR (Gurugram, Noida, Faridabad, Ghaziabad) have large private employers — global capability centres, banks, NBFCs, e-commerce, and IT services — that regularly hire for operations and support. Marks in 10th/12th matter less than graduation status, communication in English/Hindi, basic computer skills, and reliability.
metro_corporate_paths.intro: If you can relocate or already live in a major metro, many private companies hire graduates (and sometimes 12th pass) for opening-level back office, customer support, and admin work. Hiring is usually through online applications plus voice/written assessments — not board exam scores. Pay varies by shift, company, and contract (including third-party payroll); figures below are typical fresher bands seen in public job posts and are not offers from Pehchaan Careers.

roles.title: Customer support associate — voice or chat (BPO / GCC)
roles.qualification: 12th pass to graduate; many captives prefer a graduate for career progression.
roles.marks_note: Most employers do not ask for high %; they test spoken English/Hindi, typing, and scenario handling in interview.
skills_required: MS Excel basics for after-call notes
Willingness for night or rotating shifts in some teams
roles.salary_metro_range: Roughly ₹2.2–4.5 LPA fixed for many fresher voice/chat roles in 2024–26 hiring cycles, plus shift or transport allowance in some companies. Experienced agents can move toward ₹5–7 LPA in 2–3 years.
roles.typical_work: Inbound calls, email tickets, or web chat for banks, telecom, e-commerce, or tech clients. Targets are usually quality and schedule adherence, not sales (unless it is a sales blended profile — read the JD carefully).
where_to_apply: Indeed and Naukri — keywords: voice process fresher, chat support, customer care executive
Company career pages: Genpact, Teleperformance, Concentrix, Wipro, Infosys BPM, TCS iON / TCS BPS (check current listings)
LinkedIn Jobs filtered by Bengaluru / Pune / Chennai / NCR and entry level
roles.growth_tip: After 12–18 months, internal moves to quality analyst, trainer, or back-office KYC roles are common if attendance and quality scores are strong.

roles.title: Back-office / operations executive — data capture, KYC, loan processing support
roles.qualification: Graduate in any stream for many bank/NBFC vendor roles.
roles.marks_note: Employers focus on accuracy, speed, and document checking; basic graduation is the usual filter.
roles.salary_metro_range: Often ₹2.5–5 LPA for fresher operations or KYC support roles on third-party rolls in metros; permanent bank payroll can be higher but is more competitive.
roles.typical_work: Verify documents, update loan or account applications, reconcile simple reports, coordinate between branches and central teams.
where_to_apply: Naukri — operations executive, loan processing associate, KYC analyst trainee
Bank and NBFC vendor hiring (Quess, TeamLease, Randstad listings — always confirm employer name on offer letter)
Walk-in drives announced on company LinkedIn pages for Bengaluru / Chennai operations hubs
roles.growth_tip: Certifications in AML/KYC basics (short online courses) can help move from pure data entry to compliance support roles.

roles.title: MIS / data-entry trainee — reports, catalogues, invoicing support
roles.qualification: Graduate preferred; some teams hire 12th pass with strong typing scores.
roles.marks_note: Typing test (30–40 WPM) and Excel test are common; board marks rarely decide shortlisting.
skills_required: Simple charts in Excel or Google Sheets
roles.salary_metro_range: Commonly ₹2–3.8 LPA for pure data-entry or catalogue roles; MIS trainee with Excel skills may reach ₹3–4.5 LPA.
roles.typical_work: Enter invoices, update SKU data, prepare daily Excel trackers for sales or logistics teams.
where_to_apply: Amazon flex / seller support listings (check amazon.jobs India)
Startup job boards on AngelList / Wellfound for operations interns
Local staffing consultants in metro industrial belts
roles.growth_tip: Learn pivot tables and one dashboard tool (Power BI intro on Microsoft Learn — free). That single upgrade often opens analyst trainee interviews.

roles.title: Admin, reception, or front-desk coordinator — corporate offices
roles.qualification: Graduate with presentable communication; hospitality or BBA graduates also fit.
roles.marks_note: Employers look for punctuality, grooming, and MS Office; not high school percentages.
skills_required: MS Word and Excel for registers and petty cash
roles.salary_metro_range: Roughly ₹2.2–4.8 LPA for junior admin or front-desk roles in corporate parks across the four metro clusters; premium buildings may pay toward the upper end.
roles.typical_work: Manage front desk, schedule meeting rooms, support facility vendors, maintain stationery and attendance registers.
where_to_apply: Naukri — admin executive, front office executive
Facility management companies (CBRE, JLL, Sodexo — India careers)
Co-working space operators in Bengaluru and NCR
Word of mouth through relatives working in IT parks
roles.growth_tip: Short courses in office administration or ERP navigation (1–2 months) help move to executive assistant or facilities coordinator roles.

roles.title: Inside sales / tele-caller — B2B lead generation (non-retail)
roles.qualification: Graduate; some teams take 12th pass with confident speaking.
roles.marks_note: What matters is willingness to call, handle rejection, and hit activity targets — not marks.
skills_required: Reading a script without sounding robotic
CRM tool basics (Zoho, Salesforce — often trained on the job)
roles.salary_metro_range: Base often ₹2.4–4.2 LPA plus performance incentives; total monthly cash can be higher in good months but is not guaranteed.
roles.typical_work: Call SME owners or IT managers from lead lists, fix appointments for field sales, or renew software subscriptions.
where_to_apply: Naukri — inside sales executive, telecaller B2B
SaaS startups in Bengaluru and Pune (check LinkedIn startup jobs)
Insurance and edtech inside-sales teams in NCR
roles.growth_tip: If you dislike cold calling, avoid this track; if you tolerate it, 1–2 years can lead to sales coordinator or key account coordinator roles with better base pay.

hidden_skills.how: Students who struggled academically often have strong practical intelligence and people skills that bookish students lack.
Managing the stress of academic difficulty and continuing anyway is a leadership quality.

plan_b_jobs.title: ITI Trade (Electrician / Fitter / Machinist / Welder)
plan_b_jobs.qualification: Class 10 pass (any percentage) — no minimum marks for many govt ITIs
plan_b_jobs.how_skills_match: Class 10 is the only requirement. NTPC Korba, SECL, SAIL Bhilai hire ITI graduates as permanent employees with government-level benefits.
plan_b_jobs.salary_range: ₹12,000-18,000/month apprenticeship. ₹30,000-55,000/month NTPC total compensation at 5 years.
plan_b_jobs.time_to_first_job: 2 years ITI course → 1-year NTPC apprenticeship → permanent job
where_to_find: Government ITI Korba, Bilaspur, Champa (CGVYAPAM admission)
plan_b_jobs.how_to_start: Apply to Government ITI in your city through CGVYAPAM portal. Admission in July. Almost free fees.
plan_b_jobs.plan_b_complements_main: This IS the main plan for many CG students. ITI → NTPC/SECL is a complete, excellent career path. Not a backup — a first choice.

plan_b_jobs.title: Retail / E-commerce Operations (Amazon, Flipkart)
plan_b_jobs.how_skills_match: E-commerce operations (warehouse, logistics, customer service) require reliability and physical coordination — not academic marks.
plan_b_jobs.salary_range: ₹1.8–3.2 LPA starting for many warehouse / fulfilment associate roles. ₹3.5–5.5 LPA with team lead promotion in some hubs.
plan_b_jobs.how_to_start: Apply directly on Amazon Jobs or through staffing agencies.
plan_b_jobs.plan_b_complements_main: E-commerce operations experience + any online skill development (Excel, data entry) → path to better-paying back-office roles within 2-3 years.

plan_b_jobs.title: Diploma in Hotel Management / Culinary Arts
plan_b_jobs.qualification: Class 10 or 12 pass — no competitive exam
plan_b_jobs.how_skills_match: Hotel management and culinary arts diploma (1-2 years) from a government or private institute is the path to hospitality careers. No marks requirement.
plan_b_jobs.salary_range: ₹1.8–3.5 LPA starting in India for many hotel trainees. International contracts vary widely by country and employer.
where_to_find: Government Food Craft Institutes (FCI) — very low fees
State hotel management colleges via state entrance
plan_b_jobs.how_to_start: Apply to IHM (Institute of Hotel Management) or local food craft institutes. Government IHMs are affordable and have excellent industry connections.
plan_b_jobs.plan_b_complements_main: Hospitality is one of the few careers where international opportunities genuinely open up without high academics — especially for motivated, hardworking individuals.
